note: For every accept drill the support-bundle plaintext preserves the full semantic digest and the CLI / headless index preserves the coarse digest of the moderation audit-export record, so support, docs, and security teams can explain a moderation/authority resolution from the exported packet alone. Regenerate with `ci/check_moderation_authority_corpus.py --write`.

scenarios.support_export_text:
Collaboration moderation & authority-escrow audit export
invite_id: collab_invite:debug.browser_handoff
ticket_id: authority_escrow:debug.browser_handoff.grant
lobby_id: collab_lobby:debug.browser_handoff
join_request_id: collab_join_request:debug.browser_handoff
history_event_id: collab_authority_event:debug.browser_handoff.reapproved
owner_ref: collab_principal:owner.alex
moderator_ref: collab_principal:owner.alex
actor_ref: collab_principal:guest.sam
lane_class: shared_debug
scope_class: debug_step_control
grant_state_class: granted_active
reason_code_class: control_granted_temporary
decision_class: admitted_with_grant
invite_lifecycle_class: accepted
resolution_state_class: grant_active
contains_session_secret: false
scenarios.cli_index_line: shared_debug	debug_step_control	granted_active	admitted_with_grant	grant_active	secret=false	accept_browser_to_desktop_reapproved.json
